definitions.text: A worded or expressed sentence, phrase, or only a word on its own, which asks for information, a reply, or a response; an interrogative.
A subject or topic for consideration or investigation.
examples: The question of seniority will be discussed at the meeting.
There was a question of which material to use.

definitions.text: A doubt or challenge about the truth, accuracy, or validity of a matter.
examples: His claim to the property has come under question.
The story is true beyond question.

definitions.text: To ask questions of; to interrogate; to ask for information.
To raise doubts about; have doubts about.
To ask a question or questions; inquire or seek to know; examine.
